creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 207781
Patch to update to 2019.2.3

- Update to 2019.2.3
- Fix the packing list

The packing list seems to be using %%PYTHON_VER%% incorrectly in that the version numbers for some JARs coincidentally have a component which happens to match the default version of python.  However, this looks incorrect to me since there are no alternate versions and the JARs themselves have no relationship to Python.
